calendar.matters:
FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Mar-06-2023 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #23, Report, Fees
Off Calendar Dec-01-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jaime Bombard, via ZOOM, for Peter Muhs, via ZOOM, Trustee.

The court asks for the basis for the calculation of fees being requested. Ms. Bombard reports that the request is based on a percentage of the total value of the estate and the difficult circumstances of the matter. Ms. Bomabard and Mr. Muhs provide additional oral advocacy for the fees being requested in the accounting petition.

After additional discussion, the Accounting Petition is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #23, Report, Fees
Off Calendar Oct-26-2021 Continued To Nov-30-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION RE SUBSTITUTED JUDGMENT TRUST
Off Calendar Aug-05-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jaimie Bombard appeared by zoom for and with Peter Muhs (Trustee) by zoom.

The Court stated that it reviewed the papers and the file, that the only issue is the Trustee's fees and that it will do something along the same lines of what was done at the last accounting. Ms. Bombard stated that she believes the Trustee's fees are reasonable, spoke of the administrative expenses as well as the ending value of the trust, and spoke of her Client's experience and the length of the relationship her Client has had with the family. Mr. Muhs stated that nothing is substantially different now from the 21st accounting. The Twenty Second Account and Report of Trustee, etc. is under submission.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Lee. Not reported.
